## TOP INSIGHTS

| # | Insight | Layer | ID | Domínio |
|---|---------|-------|----|---------|
| 1 | BrandScript é um grid de 7 elementos que funciona para qualquer negócio | L4 | FW-DM-001 | messaging |
| 2 | 3 níveis de problema (ext/int/phil) — resolver todos no buy button = serotonina | L2 | MM-DM-003 | copywriting |
| 3 | Grunt Test: 3 perguntas em 5 segundos ou está perdendo dinheiro | L2 | MM-DM-004 | web-design |
| 4 | 85% dos compradores vieram de nurture sequence, não de venda direta | L3 | HEUR-DM-020 | email-marketing |
| 5 | Pessoa precisa ouvir 8x a mesma mensagem para metabolizar (~250 repetições) | L3 | HEUR-DM-001 | messaging |
| 6 | Header do site = 50% da efetividade total | L3 | HEUR-DM-007 | web-design |
| 7 | One-Liner: Problema + Produto + Resultado em 1 frase memorável | L4 | FW-DM-002 | messaging |
| 8 | Pink Highlighter: imprimir collateral e marcar menções a problemas do cliente | L5 | MET-DM-006 | copywriting |
| 9 | Chick-fil-A: resolve ext (fome) + int (não sentir culpa) + phil (valores) = $5.2M/loja/ano | L1 | FIL-DM-010 | brand-strategy |
| 10 | Canlis Restaurant pivotou durante pandemia PORQUE tinha email list | L3 | HEUR-DM-020 | email-marketing |
| 11 | PASTOR Framework: P-A-S-T-O-R creates sales letters in one afternoon that generate millions | L4 | FW-DM-013 | sales-copy |
| 12 | Lead gen PDF + email sequence = $250K → $1.3M pivot in one year | L3 | HEUR-DM-033 | lead-generation |
| 13 | 7 Persuasion Principles: sell without being sleazy by making it about them | L2 | MM-DM-016 | persuasion |
| 14 | 12-email campaign architecture: nurture → paradigm shift → CTA → urgency close | L4 | FW-DM-015 | email-marketing |
| 15 | 5 types of lead gen PDFs: article, interview, checklist, value list, free samples | L3 | HEUR-DM-029 | lead-generation |
| 16 | Francis Jones: 4-5 nurture emails over 10-15 days, then transition to sales | L3 | HEUR-DM-024 | email-marketing |
| 17 | FITZEE case: 118% revenue growth, 276% customer increase from StoryBrand | L3 | HEUR-DM-035 | case-study |
| 18 | Tension-Relief cycle: create problem → amplify → relieve → offer. Like fishing. | L2 | MM-DM-017 | copywriting |

---

## PADRÕES DECISÓRIOS

| Situação | Decisão | Justificativa |
|----------|---------|---------------|
| Cliente confuso sobre mensagem | Preencher BrandScript primeiro | FW-DM-001: 7 elementos organizam tudo |
| Site não converte | Refazer header com Grunt Test | HEUR-DM-007: header = 50% efetividade |
| Muitos produtos/serviços | Escolher UM problema para liderar | HEUR-DM-008: one thing rule |
| Email list pequena | Criar lead generator PDF | FW-DM-007: PDF funciona tão bem quanto vídeo |
| Pitch longo demais | Cortar pela metade | HEUR-DM-015: cut in half rule |
| Não sabe como se posicionar | Empathy + Authority = Guide | FW-DM-010: guide positioning formula |

## CASES REFERENCIADOS

| Case | Lição | IDs Relacionados |
|------|-------|-----------------|
| Jeb Bush vs Donald Trump | "Jeb Can Fix It" = hero positioning + vague. "Make America Great Again" = exercise in memorization | FIL-DM-006, MM-DM-007 |
| Chick-fil-A vs Burger King | Ext+Int+Phil problem resolved = $5.2M/store vs $1.5M | MM-DM-003, MM-DM-009 |
| Dave Ramsey | Financial Peace = one thing. Clear villain (debt). Guide positioning. | HEUR-DM-008, FW-DM-001 |
| CarMax | Removed villain (used car dealer). 3-step plans everywhere. $8.75B/year | FW-DM-001, HEUR-DM-005 |
| Canlis Restaurant | Pivoted during pandemic because of email list. Kept 120 staff employed. | HEUR-DM-020, FIL-DM-016 |
| Star Wars | Luke shoots torpedo = ext+int+phil resolved in one shot = serotonin | MM-DM-009 |
| King's Speech | Same climactic scene structure as Star Wars | MM-DM-009 |
| Markita Robinson vs James (Senate) | $12K beat $1.9M because she was guide, he was hero | FIL-DM-014, MM-DM-007 |
| FITZEE | 118% revenue growth, 276% customer increase using StoryBrand Marketing Roadmap | HEUR-DM-035 |
| Legacy Traditional charter school | 1,300 enrollments from 2-field form + 5-email sequence | HEUR-DM-033, FW-DM-015 |
| StoryBrand pivot | $250K → $1.3M in 1 year via lead-gen PDF + emails | HEUR-DM-033, FIL-DM-025 |
| Concierge medical | $800K → $2.3M in 1 year using Marketing Roadmap | HEUR-DM-033 |
| Belmont Neighborhood Pet Shop | PASTOR framework sales letter example | FW-DM-013 |
| Ray Edwards | $180K single sales letter, $10M from one PASTOR page | FW-DM-013, HEUR-DM-033 |
